message:
docs(plan): add WhiteDog progress entry for IPC and scheduler integration

This commit documents the completion of IPC search handler and scheduler
runtime integration in the multi-agent progress log.

New entry:
- 2025-11-21 (WhiteDog): IPC search installs meta-index handler (name/path)
  when index path exists; Status IPC uses BasicStatusProvider + metrics and
  sets served_by; scheduler runtime fills queue depth/active_workers.

This tracking entry ensures other agents (PurplePond, BlueHill, LilacHill, etc.)
are aware that:

1. **IPC search handler wiring** is complete:
   - MetaIndexSearchHandler installed when meta_index path is configured
   - Fallback to StubSearchHandler with warning when index unavailable
   - Search requests now route through actual metadata index queries
   - Name and path fields are searchable via Tantivy QueryParser

2. **Status IPC integration** is complete:
   - StatusRequest dispatch uses BasicStatusProvider for state
   - Metrics snapshot integrated from global prometheus registry
   - served_by field populated with hostname/computername
   - Response includes scheduler state, volumes, and queue/worker counts

3. **Scheduler runtime telemetry** is wired:
   - Queue depth (critical + metadata + content) exposed to status
   - Active workers count reported via atomic global state
   - Idle state and system load (CPU, memory, disk) sampled each tick
   - Status provider updated with formatted scheduler state string

Context: This is part of the Beads multi-agent coordination system where
agents log significant integration milestones to the PLAN file so concurrent
work streams stay aligned on system architecture and API contracts.

The integration documented here completes the end-to-end flow:
  NTFS watcher → meta-index → IPC server → search handler → query results

Next steps for other agents:
- Real queue management wiring (currently atomic placeholders)
- Actual worker process spawning based on tick() decisions
- Volume status population from NTFS watcher state

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 At a high level you’re building:
 
 **Progress log**
+- 2025-11-21 (WhiteDog): IPC search installs meta-index handler (name/path) when index path exists; Status IPC uses BasicStatusProvider + metrics and sets served_by; scheduler runtime fills queue depth/active_workers.
 - 2025-11-21 (PurplePond): c00.5.6 job-file schema v1 — index-worker consumes versioned JSON (legacy array still works), writes extracted docs into content index, supports commit_every, Extractous flag/env, preview/JSON output; workspace fmt/check/clippy clean.
 - 2025-11-21 (PurplePond): c00.5.2 worker shim expanded — index-worker supports `--job-file` (JSON array), per-job limits, preview/`--json`, env/flag Extractous toggle; workspace rebuilt after restoring scheduler/service metrics placeholders.
 - 2025-11-21 (PurplePond): c00.4.1 module wiring fixed — added idle/mod.rs + metrics/mod.rs, moved SystemLoad/SystemLoadSampler into metrics, reconciled idle tracker export; workspace check/clippy green.
